heading: Surveys in Nome and Fairbanks districts
label: 751b Surveys in Nome and Fairbanks districts
text: The Secretary of the Interior or such officer as he may designate, shall furnish the land offices at Nome and Fairbanks a sufficient quantity of numbers to be used in the different classes of official surveys that may be made in the Nome and Fairbanks land districts to meet the requirements thereof, and upon application by any person desiring to have an official survey made such officers as the Secretary of the Interior may designate shall furnish a number or numbers for such survey or surveys, together with an order directing a qualified deputy surveyor to make the same, and such application, order, and the fee required to be paid shall be transmitted to the Secretary of the Interior or such officer as he may designate: , That all surveys thus made shall be approved by the Secretary of the Interior or such officer as he may designate.Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 352 of Title 48
Repeals, , cited as a credit to this section, was repealed by , , .Act Oct. 9, 1942, ch. 584, § 256 Stat. 779Pub. L. 89–554, § 8(a)80 Stat. 651Sept. 6, 1966

Abolition of Offices of Receiver and Surveyor General and Transfer of FunctionsReferences to “receivers” changed to “registers” by act , which abolished office of receiver and transferred functions to an employee to be designated by Secretary and to be performed under title “register”.Oct. 9, 1942Act , abolished office of surveyor general and transferred administration of all activities in charge of surveyors general to Field Surveying Service under jurisdiction of United States Supervisor of Surveys.Mar. 3, 1925

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of other officers, employees, and agencies of Department of the Interior, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of the Interior, with power to delegate, see Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1950, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 3174, , set out under .May 24, 195064 Stat. 1262section 1451 of this titleFunctions of Supervisor of Surveys and Registers transferred to Secretary of the Interior or those officers as he may designate by section 403 of Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1946. See note set out under .section 1 of this title
